Title: [SETUP] Frontend runtime only
Description: Keep root scripts as wrappers for frontend/ runtime. Remove legacy root app/lib paths.
Label: Setup

Title: [SETUP] Configure API clients & env
Description: Use frontend/.env.local as source of truth. Configure Speechmatics, OpenAI, Backboard keys.
Label: Setup

Title: [SETUP] Backboard bootstrap
Description: Run npm run setup-backboard and persist BACKBOARD_ASSISTANT_ID + BACKBOARD_THREAD_* vars.
Label: Setup

Title: [VOICE] Speechmatics real-time STT
Description: Realtime token mint + websocket failover + final/partial transcript handling.
Label: Voice

Title: [VOICE] OpenAI TTS output
Description: Use OpenAI TTS with short spoken-response shaping for conversational latency.
Label: Voice

Title: [VOICE] Waveform visualizer
Description: Reactive mic/response visualizer while recording and while processing response.
Label: UI

Title: [MEMORY] Capture endpoint persistence
Description: POST /api/capture must await writes and return stored/stored_targets/failed_targets.
Label: Memory

Title: [MEMORY] Query endpoint reliability
Description: POST /api/query should use shared retry policy and friendly 503 on transient outages.
Label: Memory

Title: [MEMORY] Log endpoint persistence
Description: POST /api/log must avoid fire-and-forget and expose explicit persistence status.
Label: Memory

Title: [AGENT] Auto orchestrator parity
Description: POST /api/orchestrate should mirror query reliability metadata and persistence fields.
Label: Agentic

Title: [SAFETY] Mandatory AMM disclaimer
Description: All advisory responses end with fixed disclaimer in prompt and server guard.
Label: Safety

Title: [DATA] Seed Marc knowledge
Description: Use data/marc-knowledge.json + npm run seed-backboard to pre-populate Backboard memory.
Label: Demo Data

Title: [UI] Main demo interface
Description: Auto/Capture/Query/Log with hold-to-speak, transcript panel, response sources, aircraft badge.
Label: UI

Title: [DEMO] Rehearsal smoke checks
Description: Run repeatable smoke checklist before demo: STT token, query, capture, log, TTS.
Label: Demo
